text:
Once upon a moonlit night in the lush forest of Everwood, there lived a curious and adventurous squirrel named Sunny. She lived in a hollow snug amid the giant oak trees, surrounded by moss banks and little sparkling pond critters.

One glittering morning, after breakfast of nuts and seeds, Sunny rummaged through the leaf pile and found an ancient tome. It called itself the "Guide to the Stars." Intrigued, she curled up inside.

As she flipped through the pages, she discovered how every constellation held a story, a tale of twinkling hearts across the vastness of space. There was Orion, guarding his lost wife. And Perseverance, steadfast.

Each night, Sunny would escape her home just enough to escape her usual nut collection and listen to these constellations singing.

"Your courage beats the stars," she'd say to Orion.

One day, when the oak tree leaves danced with her voice, she heard a rustling. Peeking through the leaves
